# UC-12.3.21 · AWX Execution Environment Pull Image Errors

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Availability, Fault &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch this part of your delivery chain for risks and reliability so issues show up before they hit customers.*

---

## Description

Bad EE images block all templates using that environment.

## Value

Isolates registry auth and image tag problems for automation platform teams.

## Implementation

Track EE version tags; correlate with Quay/Artifactory audit logs if ingested.

## SPL

```spl
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" OR sourcetype="awx:server"
| search "execution_environment" OR "container image" OR "ImagePull"
| search "error" OR "BackOff" OR "not found"
| stats count by execution_environment, host
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (EE × error count), Pie chart (top registries).

## Known False Positives

Image pulls from new registries during vendor migrations, mirror setup, or pilot tooling evaluation.

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
